subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thou art a manifestation of bounty and the object of providential favor. In gratitude for divine bestowals, serve thou at the Threshold of Oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله مظهر موهبتی و منظور نظر عنایت بشکرانه الطاف الهیه بخدمت درگاه احدیت
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for women, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @love of God
